title: Voldt
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:AJ7-p171.jpg]] |name=Voldt
{{C|on the right}} |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{JournalCite|7|Retreat from Coruscant}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] |masters= |apprentices= }} Commander '''Voldt''' served aboard the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor]] cruiser ''[[Requital]]'', during the New Republic retreat from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. He was responsible for catching the many small ships that escaped the Imperial blockade. When he boarded the [[Core Courier Service]] vessel [[Messenger (starship)|''Messenger'']] he failed to discover anything to directly connect the ship to the New Republic, although he did plant a homing beacon in the vessel's cargo hold. This beacon allowed an Imperial [[Carrack]]-class cruiser to interrupt a meeting between the crew of the ''Messenger'' and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], and later led it directly to the location of the New Republic fleet, where it was destroyed before it could escape. ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|7|Retreat from Coruscant|reprint=1}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Navy officers of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Males]]
